---
title: "Preprocessing"
author: "Haohong Zheng & Ziqing Li"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Preprocessing Function


We write a function that loads a `.csv.gz` file from the `data/` directory, converts all `"\\N"` values to proper `NA`, and returns the resulting tibble.

```{r preprocess-function}
preprocess <- function(file_name) {
  file_path <- paste0(file_name, ".csv.gz")
  
  table <- read_csv(file_path, na = c("", "NA", "\\N"), show_col_types = FALSE)
  
  return(table)
}
```

## Load and Save All Tables

We apply the preprocessing function to each of the sample `.csv.gz` files and save the results as `.rda` files.

```{r load-and-save}
gz_files <- list.files(".", pattern = "_sample\\.csv\\.gz$", full.names = FALSE)

file_names <- str_replace(gz_files, "\\.csv\\.gz$", "")

for (fn in file_names) {
  table <- preprocess(fn)
  write_rds(table, paste0(fn, ".rda"))
  cat("Processed:", fn, "->", nrow(table), "rows,", ncol(table), "cols\n")
}
```

```{r verify}
list.files(".", pattern = "\\.rda$")
```
